title: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]"You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching."[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?

options.title: Trudge On
options.description: Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lose [red]11[/red] HP.

options.title: Rest
options.description: Heal [green][varies by current HP][/green] HP. Fight some [red]enemies[/red].

notes: The [gold]REST[/gold] option heals based on standard rest site healing (varies by current HP) and then triggers a combat encounter. The [gold]TRUDGE_ON[/gold] option requires removing a card from the deck and inflicts 11 unblockable, unpowered damage, concluding the event. Choosing REST leads to a secondary page where the player is awakened by a mysterious threat and must fight enemies in combat.
